zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Valletort於1165年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾薩爾塔申時，他的父親Ralph de Valletort26歲，母親Joan de Dunstanville23歲。他於1190年與Alesia de Dunstanville在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1206年10月13日在英國英格蘭戴文托特斯享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Valletort于1165年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾薩爾塔申时，他的父亲Ralph de Valletort26岁，母亲Joan de Dunstanville23岁。他于1190年与Alesia de Dunstanville在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1206年10月13日在英国英格兰戴文托特斯享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Valletort was born in 1165, in Saltash, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Valletort, was 26 and his mother, Joan de Dunstanville, was 23. He married Alesia de Dunstanville in 1190, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 13 October 1206, in Totnes, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Valletort est né en 1165, à Saltash, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Valletort, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de Dunstanville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alesia de Dunstanville en 1190, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1206, à Totnes, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Valletort 1165 in Saltash, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Valletort 26 und seine Mutter Joan de Dunstanville 23. Er hat 1190 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Alesia de Dunstanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1206 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Totnes, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Valletort è nato il nel 1165 nel Saltash, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Valletort, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Dunstanville, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Alesia de Dunstanville nel 1190, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 13 ottobre 1206, nel Totnes, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Valletortが1165年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルサルタッシュで生まれた時，父Ralph de Valletortは26歳，母Joan de Dunstanvilleは23歳であった。1190年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでAlesia de Dunstanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1206年10月13日にイギリスイギリスデボントトンスで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Valletort(이)가 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 살타시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Valletort(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Dunstanville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Alesia de Dunstanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1206년 10월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토트네스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Valletort nasceu em 1165, em Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Valletort, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Dunstanville, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Alesia de Dunstanville em 1190, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1206, em Totnes, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Valletort родился в 1165 г. в местности салташ, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Valletort было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Dunstanville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alesia de Dunstanville в 1190 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 13 октября 1206 г. в местности тотнесь, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Valletort nació en 1165, en Saltash, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Valletort, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan de Dunstanville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Alesia de Dunstanville en 1190, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1206, en Totnes, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
